fixes.origin:
command = f"tar -tzf {bundle_path} >/dev/null && {post_action}"
result = subprocess.run(
    command,
    shell=True,
    capture_output=True,
    text=True,
)
fixes.replacement:
result = subprocess.run(
    ["tar", "-tzf", str(bundle_path)],
    stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,
    stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
    text=True,
)
